subcodes.first_line: O my God! When I invoke Thee with my tongue and remember Thee within my heart, and adjure Thee by the Manifestations of the sanctified sovereignty of Thine eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا یا الهی ادعوک بلسانی و اذکرک بقلبی و اقسمک بمظاهر قدس سلطان ازلیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for forgiveness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
